# Watch list for the "prompt-generator" feature.
# One "<repo>:<path>" per line. repo = fe (../glific-frontend) | be (this repo, glific).
# The fingerprint = hash of these files' contents; if any changes, the cached
# test results are stale and the suite must be re-run.

# --- Frontend (UI + GraphQL + mocks) ---
fe:src/containers/Assistants/CreateAssistant/PromptGeneratorModal.tsx
fe:src/containers/Assistants/CreateAssistant/PromptGeneratorModal.module.css
fe:src/mocks/PromptGenerator.ts
fe:src/graphql/mutations/PromptGenerator.ts
fe:src/graphql/queries/PromptGenerator.ts

# --- Backend (engine + GraphQL surface + Kaapi callback) ---
be:lib/glific/prompt_generator.ex
be:lib/glific/prompt_generator/prompt_generation_request.ex
be:lib/glific_web/resolvers/prompt_generator.ex
be:lib/glific_web/schema/prompt_generator_types.ex
be:lib/glific_web/controllers/kaapi_controller.ex
